category_sources: Official docs describe Hermes Agent as a self-improving autonomous agent with memory, skills, tools, and CLI/messaging interfaces.
source_facts.description says it is a self-improving AI agent that creates skills from experience.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and docs title use "Hermes Agent".
docs_sources: Official homepage links to a dedicated Docs section at /docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent; repo returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs list CLI usage, automation, memory, skills, and model/provider integrations.
source_facts.description mentions AI agent and skills.
